TopModule.BindInstances: A_local_U A_local_1_U A_local_2_U A_local_3_U A_local_4_U A_local_5_U A_local_6_U A_local_7_U B_local_U B_local_1_U B_local_2_U B_local_3_U B_local_4_U B_local_5_U B_local_6_U B_local_7_U B_local_8_U B_local_9_U B_local_10_U B_local_11_U B_local_12_U B_local_13_U B_local_14_U B_local_15_U B_local_16_U C_local_U control_s_axi_U gmem_a_m_axi_U gmem_b_m_axi_U gmem_c_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Read/Write, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: CTRL, 0x00, 32, RW, Control signals, 0=AP_START 1=AP_DONE 2=AP_IDLE 3=AP_READY 7=AUTO_RESTART 9=INTERRUPT
GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
a_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of a,
a_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of a,
b_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of b,
b_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of b,
c_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of c,
c_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of c,
clock, ap_clk
reset, ap_rst_n
interrupt, interrupt
ap_ctrl_hs,
in, int const *
in, int const *
out, int*

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.column: write, 16, 512

table.keys: HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location
table.column: a, matmul_full_contiguous.cpp:22:19, read, Widened, 16, load_ab_full_loop, matmul_full_contiguous.cpp:20:3
